title: Bee's SMP
description: Heavy tech based modpack, with Custom World Generation, Leaving Earth, Exploring the space.
body:
# This pack is updated when needs to be!

This Pack is ONLY WORKS in CLIENT SIDE! If you want the server ready pack please ask me on Discord! Discord Username: someone_dead_ or ``_beethefoxgirl_``

**PLEASE BE AWARE THIS PACK ONLY RUNS SMOOTHLY IF YOU HAVE AT LEAST 6GB OF RAM ADDED TO YOUR MINECRAFT, ALSO YOU NEED A FAIRLY STRONGER CPU!**




## The Modpack Contains:

- Leaving Athomsphere??? YES! Craft your own rocket! And leave the course of Earth! Make a new city on another planet!

- Exploring Planets new dimensions??? Planets??? More than one? Yes! Actually around 35 new planets! but what about Dimensions? Yes! We have a lot!

- Biome Overhaul (100+ New biomes and animals... Most of them bites)

- Heavy Technology? We have oil! (Don't tell America...)

- Medievel Magic's You can cast your own spell!

- And Much much more!
  
### ---------- Plus Info:

Most of the mods are compatible with eachother, but! 

There is some Known issues:

- JEI Tends to **NOT** Recognize recipes especically from Addon mods.

- World loading is slower than usual, This is because of the Biome Overhaul. if you want a Faster load remove the Custom Biome Mods: (Only in SinglePlayer, If you want to play on the Dedicated server you don't need to remove them Server will handle the biome gen)
  - Biomes We've gone
  - Bioms 'o Plenty
  - Etc etc...
